def.prof.nonProficientUse.name: Non-Proficient Use of Weapons and Armor

name.text: Non-Proficient Use of Weapons and Armor

specs.note: One weight category heavier than the class permits.

from.pattern: only a (-?\d+) penalty on attack throws

specs.note: Replaces the base non-visibility penalty; a smaller penalty, so a net gain.
The blinded surprise penalty does not apply.
The blinded speed reduction does not apply.
Specializes one style the character is already proficient in.
Adds one selected weapon group to the class list.
